messages.text: Basket 1 is a light tan woven basket shaped like a duck: oval body with a lid, and a duck head on the right (eye and small beak visible), plus a small handle/strap on top.
Done. Go to Basket 2
Basket 2: a deep, rounded bucket-shaped wicker basket with a very dark brown thick arched handle; medium-brown body with a darker band around the rim.
Placed it. Go to Basket 3
Basket 3: boxy rectangular picnic basket with a tall center handle; the hinged lid is open and sticking up/leaning to the right.
Done. Go to Basket 4

Basket 4: an oval, boat-shaped wicker basket with light tan + white/cream banding; single arched handle that looks wrapped in pale material, with small reddish accents near where the handle meets the sides.
Is it the two-tone basket with a wide cream band around the middle (not the mostly white basket with a thin tan rim)?
Yes—pick the two-tone boat-shaped one with the wide cream/white band around the middle and the little reddish accents where the handle attaches (not the mostly white basket).
Done. Go to Basket 5
Basket 5: low rectangular honey-brown basket with a thick twisted-rope handle; tight checkerboard weave with darker vertical strips.
Is it the small low rectangle with a chunky braided handle (not the larger greenish rectangular one)?
Yes—pick the small low honey-brown rectangle with the chunky twisted/braided handle (not the larger greenish rectangular one).
Done. Go to Basket 7
low honey-brown
Is it a shallow round tray-like basket with one handle (not a deeper bowl-shaped one)?
Not the shallow round tray—this one is a low honey-brown rectangular basket with a single arched handle.
Done. Go to Basket 8
Basket 5: low rectangular medium-brown basket with a thick twisted-rope handle and tight checker-weave sides.
Done. Go to Basket 9

duck head on the right with a small beak and a visible eye
oval body with a flat lid and a small handle/strap on top
reasoning.discriminative_strategy: Emphasize that it’s a duck-shaped basket (not the cat-face one), with the duck head/beak on the right side.
